resources.string: Tap to switch between Normal, Vibrate, and Silent
Tap to switch between Normal, Vibrate, and Silent
How to use:\nLong-press the Home screen → Widgets →\nSelect "Sound Mode Widget"
⚠️ Do Not Disturb access: Not granted
⚠️ Notification permission: Not granted (required for monitoring service)
\nAdd the widget to your Home screen
Do Not Disturb access is already granted
This device does not require Do Not Disturb access
Monitors sound mode changes and updates the widget
Detects sound mode changes and updates the widget
